title: Baxzar Platform
excerpt: Full-stack e-commerce solution with Next.js and Django REST API.
content: A complete e-commerce platform featuring user authentication, product management, shopping cart, and payment integration.
summary: Modern e-commerce platform built with Next.js frontend and Django REST API backend, featuring Stripe payments, admin dashboard, and responsive design.
html:
Overview

This e-commerce platform demonstrates modern full-stack development practices with a focus on performance, security, and user experience.

Key Features

  • User authentication and authorization
  • Product catalog with search and filtering
  • Shopping cart and checkout process
  • Stripe payment integration
  • Admin dashboard for inventory management
  • Responsive design for all devices

Technical Highlights

The frontend uses Next.js 15 with TypeScript for type safety and modern React features. The backend is built with Django REST Framework, providing a robust API for all operations.

title: Portfolio Website
excerpt: Modern portfolio site built with Next.js 16 and React Query.
content: Personal portfolio showcasing projects, blog posts, and professional experience with modern web technologies.
summary: This portfolio demonstrates advanced Next.js patterns including Server Components, React Query for data fetching, and a Perry the Platypus-inspired color scheme.
html:
About This Project

This portfolio site demonstrates modern web development practices with the latest React and Next.js features.

Features

  • GitHub stats integration with React Query
  • Perry the Platypus-inspired color palette
  • Shadcn/UI component library
  • SEO optimized with structured data
  • Responsive design with mobile navigation

title: RJ Ure Sanguinis
excerpt: Legal services platform specializing in Italian citizenship by descent.
content: A comprehensive platform for managing Italian citizenship applications through jure sanguinis (right of blood), featuring client management, document tracking, and case status updates.
summary: Professional legal services platform built with modern web technologies, helping individuals obtain Italian citizenship through ancestry. Features include client portal, document management, and automated workflow tracking.
html:
Overview

RJ Ure Sanguinis is a specialized legal services platform focused on Italian citizenship by descent. The platform streamlines the complex process of obtaining Italian citizenship through ancestry.

Key Features

  • Client management system
  • Document tracking and verification
  • Case status updates and notifications
  • Secure client portal
  • Multilingual support (English/Portuguese)
  • Professional legal documentation

Technical Implementation

Built with Next.js for optimal performance and SEO. The platform uses modern React patterns and TypeScript for type safety, ensuring a robust and maintainable codebase.

title: Subsidies.io
excerpt: AI-powered platform for discovering government subsidies and grants.
content: An intelligent platform that helps businesses and individuals discover relevant government subsidies, grants, and funding opportunities using AI-powered matching algorithms.
summary: AI-driven subsidy discovery platform that matches users with relevant government funding opportunities. Features advanced search, personalized recommendations, and application tracking.
html:
Overview

Subsidies.io leverages artificial intelligence to help businesses and individuals find relevant government subsidies and funding opportunities. The platform aggregates data from multiple sources and uses smart matching algorithms.

Key Features

  • AI-powered subsidy matching
  • Personalized recommendations
  • Real-time database of opportunities
  • Application tracking and reminders
  • Eligibility assessment tools
  • Multi-jurisdiction support

Technical Highlights

The platform integrates OpenAI APIs for intelligent matching and uses advanced data processing pipelines to keep subsidy information current and accurate.

title: DevPack Group
excerpt: Software development agency website showcasing services and portfolio.
content: Corporate website for DevPack Group, a software development agency specializing in custom web applications, mobile apps, and digital transformation services.
summary: Professional agency website featuring modern design, service offerings, portfolio showcases, and client testimonials. Built with performance and conversion optimization in mind.
html:
Overview

DevPack Group's corporate website showcases the agency's expertise in custom software development, featuring an impressive portfolio and comprehensive service descriptions.

Key Features

  • Responsive modern design
  • Interactive portfolio gallery
  • Service pages with detailed information
  • Client testimonials and case studies
  • Contact and consultation forms
  • Blog and resources section

Technical Implementation

Built with Next.js 14+ for optimal performance and SEO. Features smooth animations using Framer Motion and a fully responsive design that works seamlessly across all devices.

title: Enlaces Automotrices
excerpt: Automotive parts and services platform connecting suppliers and mechanics.
content: B2B platform for the automotive industry, connecting parts suppliers with mechanics and repair shops. Features inventory management, order processing, and logistics coordination.
summary: Comprehensive automotive industry platform facilitating connections between parts suppliers and repair professionals. Includes real-time inventory, order management, and delivery tracking.
html:
Overview

Enlaces Automotrices revolutionizes the automotive parts supply chain by providing a digital platform that connects suppliers directly with mechanics and repair shops.

Key Features

  • Real-time inventory management
  • Order processing and tracking
  • Supplier and buyer profiles
  • Search and filtering by part specifications
  • Delivery coordination and logistics
  • Invoice and payment management

Technical Architecture

The platform uses a modern stack with Next.js frontend and Node.js backend, leveraging AWS for scalable infrastructure. PostgreSQL database ensures data integrity for critical business operations.
